name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Tuesday's elections
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Tuesday marks the largest set of primaries and caucuses in the Democratic nomination process with six states voting for president and 694 pledged delegates up for grabs.
Pundits and the political press want to call this race early before every last person votes. That threatens to suppress voter turnout in New Jersey, California, North Dakota, South Dakota, Montana, and New Mexico. But we're not going to let that happen.
On Tuesday, we're going to defy the pundits once more and reach for the kind of high voter turnout that will again shock the establishment. **Help reach Bernie voters:**
To get logged on and start making calls, just head on over to our **[California phonebanking page](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/content/caphonebank "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/content/caphonebank")**.
**[I'm ready to call California voters!](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/content/caphonebank "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/content/caphonebank")**
Throughout this race, we've been sending the establishment a message they can't ignore: we won't settle for the status quo. We won't settle for a rigged economy held in place by a corrupt system of campaign finance. We won't settle for a fossil fuel industry hell-bent on harming our planet to pad their profits. We won't settle for a health system that doesn't cover everyone.
Let's make our voices heard loud and clear once more in the six states voting Tuesday. **[Please make calls to get out the vote for Bernie in California.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/content/caphonebank "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/content/caphonebank") **
In California, a high voter turnout won't just mean a victory for our movement. With large numbers of young people hitting the polls, we'll boost so many Democrats in major primaries that right-wing Republicans will be locked out of general election ballots for some of the most important House and Senate races of the fall.
Members of the media and political establishment may have anointed Secretary Clinton from day one, but we know that this race is going to carry on until the delegates cast ballots at the convention in Philadelphia.
We should let the voters decide who they want the Democratic nominee to be rather than having the media decide for them. I am asking you to continue to stand with Bernie in pushing for the political revolution.
[Please make calls to get out the vote for Bernie in California.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/content/caphonebank "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/content/caphonebank")
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

**[I can't volunteer, but I'll contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/shock?refcode=em160607 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/shock?refcode=em160607")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Christie Fogarty
subject: A special invitation
body:
---
Peter,

I'd like to extend this invitation to you to be a part of an elite group of half a million Heritage Foundation members who believe in and fight to defend the Constitution and America's founding principles.

[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/35762715:Wxau1EYFN:m:1:1155937413:2F7081E99B9A22CAC1BBC4EEBCFA03DF:r)

Once you [activate your Heritage membership](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/35762715:Wxau1EYFN:m:1:1155937413:2F7081E99B9A22CAC1BBC4EEBCFA03DF:r), your 2016 membership card will be on its way!

I hope you carry your card with pride -- knowing the good you are doing for the future of our country.

But first you need to [activate your membership online](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/35762715:Wxau1EYFN:m:1:1155937413:2F7081E99B9A22CAC1BBC4EEBCFA03DF:r).

**[https://secured.heritage.org/join](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/35762715:Wxau1EYFN:m:1:1155937413:2F7081E99B9A22CAC1BBC4EEBCFA03DF:r)**

With your generous contribution to support The Heritage Foundation, you will enable our essential work of guiding conservatives leaders in Congress, building a strong conservative movement that will uphold the Constitution, and restoring our standing as the greatest nation on earth.

[By becoming a Heritage member](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/35762715:Wxau1EYFN:m:1:1155937413:2F7081E99B9A22CAC1BBC4EEBCFA03DF:r), you will take a conservative stand in this all-important election year -- standing up for the principles and ideas of the American Founding that are worth defending and renewing.

Thank you so much for all you do for Heritage and for our country.

Sincerely,

Christie Fogarty
Director of Membership Programs
The Heritage Foundation

P.S. If you are already a Heritage member for 2016 and received this in error, please let us know by emailing us at [info@heritage.org](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/35762716:Wxau1EYFN:m:1:1155937413:2F7081E99B9A22CAC1BBC4EEBCFA03DF:r).

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: I'm stunned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|

>
> Friend, for over a decade Maryland has had a proven and effective policy to increase the amount of renewable energy used by our utility companies. It's a system that's helped our state create jobs and be a leader in addressing climate change.
>
> Last week Governor Hogan had the opportunity to advance this important legacy, but instead he decided to block Maryland's progress in renewable energy by vetoing a key piece of legislation.
>
> **[Add your name to stand with me and show Maryland Republicans that we are serious about renewable energy.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91df3/70cdc2ba/47ead04d/3972f62/3827699333/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/help-support-renewable-energy?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+to+stand+with+me+and+show+&utm_campaign=em060616&source=em060616")**
>
> Over the past 20 years, I've never given up on a tough fight, especially when I'm fighting to protect our environment for future generations. That's why I'm so invested in this fight.
>
> There are 4,300 people working in the solar industry in Maryland and the Governor's veto will have damaging effects on their future and put thousands of jobs and hundreds of local Maryland companies at risk.
>
> **[Please, add your name and make it clear that fighting climate change and advancing renewable energy jobs in our state should not be a partisan issue.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91df3/70cdc2ba/47ead04d/3972f63/3827699333/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/help-support-renewable-energy?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+FIRSTNAMEPlease+add+your+name+and+make+i&utm_campaign=em060616&source=em060616")**
>
> Thanks for adding your voice,
>
> Chris

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: We need these folks in Congress no matter what
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Ours is a campaign to transform our country economically, politically, socially, and environmentally.
And if we are going to do that, **we need to challenge the Democratic Party establishment to decide if it is going to fight for working families, or will it do the bidding of Wall Street, big oil, and the pharmaceutical industry?**
Here's the truth: no president, not the greatest president you could possibly imagine, can take on these special interests alone. That is why I have already endorsed several progressive challengers running for Congress this November.
Today I am adding two more to that list. **If you stand with them -- like we have stood together throughout this campaign -- we're going to transform the the Democratic Party, and we are going to transform this country.**
[**Split a $2.70 contribution between our campaign and six progressive challengers I 've endorsed and we are going to send a powerful message about the future of the Democratic Party that we demand.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-congress?refcode=em160607-v3 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-congress?refcode=em160607-v3")
**Lucy Flores** is running in a Democratic primary against a multi-millionaire funding her own campaign and an establishment choice with the backing of a large super PAC. Her primary is one week from today. She needs our help.
**Zephyr Teachout** and **Pramila Jayapal** are proving that you can run an unapologetically progressive campaign funded by small-dollar donors and win tough elections. **Tim Canova** is running in a primary against DNC Chair Debbie Wasserman Schultz, and doing so on the themes and issues that have powered our political revolution.
And the two new candidates I'm endorsing are **Eric Kingson** who has led the fight to protect and expand Social Security. He even had the courage to challenge the president when he considered cuts years ago. Second is **Paul Clements** , another progressive who is running against a climate-denier who only won his last election because of Koch Brothers' spending.
Electing these six candidates will send an unmistakable message about our vision for the future of the Democratic Party. And that's why I am happy to ask:
[**Split a $2.70 contribution between our campaign and six progressive challengers I 've endorsed and we are going to send a powerful message about the future of the Democratic Party that we demand.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-congress?refcode=em160607-v3 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-congress?refcode=em160607-v3")
We are all eagerly awaiting tonight's results. It should be an important night for our political revolution, and no matter what the result, our success is because millions of people have come together to say that the billionaire class cannot have it all.
Supporting these six terrific progressive candidates is an extension of our work through this campaign.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-congress?refcode=em160607-v3 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-congress?refcode=em160607-v3")

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: I believe in her
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
I've been watching Hillary | Friend --

Eight years ago, I was fighting tooth-and-nail to wrap up the primary for then-Senator Barack Obama. I was so exhausted from more than a year of doing battle that I still almost can’t believe how much I’m looking forward to watching Hillary Clinton officially clinch the Democratic nomination today.

And yet -- over the last eight years, I’ve watched Hillary work her heart out to make people's lives better as Secretary of State under her former opponent’s administration. I’ve heard her speak forcefully and clearly on all manner of foreign and domestic issues, and I’ve read her policy proposals -- they’re the kind of detailed plans that can actually get done.

I’m excited. We’re going to have to fight like hell to take on the Republican Party. Trump may be having a rough week -- it's never a good sign when being caught having lied about donating to veterans' charities was actually one of your better days -- but he is unpredictable and could pose a serious threat, especially with the GOP establishment lining up behind him, checkbooks in hand.

If we want to leave nothing to chance and make sure this guy never makes it to the White House, we have to start building up a lot more resources right now.

clean_body: I've been watching Hillary | Friend -- Eight years ago, I was fighting tooth-and-nail to wrap up the primary for then-Senator Barack Obama. I was so exhausted from more than a year of doing battle that I still almost can’t believe how much I’m looking forward to watching Hillary Clinton officially clinch the Democratic nomination today. And yet -- over the last eight years, I’ve watched Hillary work her heart out to make people's lives better as Secretary of State under her former opponent’s administration. I’ve heard her speak forcefully and clearly on all manner of foreign and domestic issues, and I’ve read her policy proposals -- they’re the kind of detailed plans that can actually get done. I’m excited. We’re going to have to fight like hell to take on the Republican Party. Trump may be having a rough week -- it's never a good sign when being caught having lied about donating to veterans' charities was actually one of your better days -- but he is unpredictable and could pose a serious threat, especially with the GOP establishment lining up behind him, checkbooks in hand. If we want to leave nothing to chance and make sure this guy never makes it to the White House, we have to start building up a lot more resources right now. The best thing you can do today is take four minutes of your time and \- you'll see that it was a slam dunk for Eric. Thanks, AC Austin Chambers Campaign Manager Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer 4579 Laclede Avenue #138 -- St. Louis, Missouri 63108

name: Steve Bullock
subject: humbling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

Thank you to everyone who took the time to get out and vote today. I'm humbled to see the outpouring of support.

Tomorrow begins a new stage of the campaign -- the general election. I'm going to be out working as hard as I can, because I deeply believe that what makes Montana great -- access to public lands, support for public education, fiscal responsibility -- is at stake.

Greg Gianforte has already spent hundreds of thousands of dollars of his money on his campaign and we're expecting millions more. **[Help us get ready for the general election and show that Montana can't be bought. Donate $15 today.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=2IcsXbwqVnRsON06geWx9%2B5XF3v6LTKw)**
Thanks,

Steve Bullock
